positive: Stylized minimal illustration of a friendly, whimsical celestial creature—a glowing bio-luminescent jellyfish floating among geometric, stylized constellations and nebula clouds. The creature should have elegant, flowing tendrils and a central glow. Composition must be central and balanced, suitable for a repeating print or singular apparel graphic. Use a high-contrast, deep navy blue, indigo, and vibrant cyan/electric teal color palette. The style should be modern flat vector art with subtle gradient accents, evoking the look of elegant Nordic folklore meets retro sci-fi poster art. Ensure clean, crisp lines and strong silhouettes against the dark background. Highly detailed, aesthetically pleasing, poster quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, noise, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, extra limbs, logos, signatures, anime, photorealistic, 3d render, messy composition
